chunks.text: Ali M. Niknejad's Research Homepage Our group's primary research interests include mm-wave/microwave research using CMOS/SiGe, analog integrated circuits , device modeling ( BSIM ), applied electromagnetics, with applications focused on

ied electromagnetics, with applications focused on high-speed and low-power communication systems, radar and imaging, and medical sensing. We have been conducting research on CMOS PAs for the past 20 years covering bands from 2.4 GHz to 200 GH

ast 20 years covering bands from 2.4 GHz to 200 GHz and power levels from milliwatts to watts: This also includes our work on mixed-signal PAs, also called "Digital" PAs: ☰ Home Publications Research Staff Instruction Software Biography Slideshow
